entry.title: Re: SAC - Widget with separate filters
entry.content:
Hi FrancescoPetrocelli, 

  As you want to have only ONE page, instead of using story filter, I would recommend you use page filter. With page filter, you can easily define which widget it links to. 

Best regards, William

entry.title: Re: Document number CO_BELNR to RPSCO

thanks a lot for your answer - you saved my day! that is exactly what I needed!

entry.title: Re: How can you tell when a customers name and address has been changed?
entry.content:
Hello Stephen

Info on what is registered as a change in the Bus.Partner-area and more can be found in SAP-KBA 3411039 - FAQ: Change History Display for Business Partners - SAP for Me (for instance : check report "BUSCHDOC").

Judging by your question, why not consider using a BAdI in the Address related area to influence the formatting? If might be possible to use the "ADDRESS_CHECK" BAdI or any other related BAdI upon a change of the Address / Communication data ...

Hope this helps

Nic T.

entry.title: SAP Customers Conversations Event: SAP S/4HANA public cloud @ Zelestra
entry.content:
Dear Utilities Community

We are pleased to invite you to our upcoming Customer Conversations LIVE Event with Zelestra about their Grow with SAP journey. In this session Borja Guerrero, Chief Digital Officer from our customer Zelestra is going to discuss how they leverage the capabilities of SAP to sustain growth.

In this webinar, our experts will discuss advanced features and best practices for SAP covering a range of topics including:

- Project overview
- Benefits gained
- Lessons learned
- Demo of the system
- Q&A session with participants

Whether you are a long-time SAP user looking to optimize your system or you are considering an SAP implementation for the first time, this webinar will provide you with valuable information to help you make the most of your investment.

Date: Wednesday, October 30, 2024

Time: 3:00 PM Central European Time

Duration: 1 hour

 

Please register here

entry.title: E2E Use Case: Realizing a Data Product Architecture with SAP IT
entry.content:
Our mission in enterprise analytics is to empower every SAP employee to make AI-powered, data-driven decisions that drive innovation in our product portfolio, accelerate insights to action, and delight our customers. The SAP Datasphere Data Marketplace is the cornerstone of how we enable employees to access Data Products more quickly. 

In the 7th episode of the SAP Datasphere Data Marketplace demo series, we demonstrate a comprehensive end-to-end use case that illustrates how SAP implements a data product architecture. The use case is structured into four sequential steps, providing a overview of the entire process.

The Demo begins with finding the right data product in the Data Marketplace, followed by the installation and usage of that product. Next, the focus shifts to the SAP Catalog, demonstrating how data product consumers can benefit from the provided information. The fourth section dives into the modeling process, where existing data products are used to create derived data products for further analysis and reporting. 

Click here to watch the video!

The Demo shows how existing data products are combined and refined to create new, derived data products that enhance analysis and reporting capabilities. The use case is rooted in a CSRD reporting scenario, illustrating how SAP utilizes existing data products and enriches them with additional information to meet specific reporting requirements.

Enjoy watching!

entry.title: Re: User name for last changer of maintenance plan header...

entry.title: Re: Enabling In-Order processing with SAP Integration Suite, advanced event mesh Partitioned Queues

entry.title: PO to show next price break quantity on item from SPP2 shows 'Invalid numeric value' error if > 1k
entry.content:
Hi All,

I've created a UDF on marketing document rows to show the next quantity price break on each item if it exists.
This works as needed up until the next quantity price break is 1,000 or more.
How can I amend the FMS too ignore the comma in the number format?

 

SELECT T0.[Amount] FROM SPP2 T0 WHERE T0.[ItemCode] =$[$38.1.0] and  T0.[CardCode] =$[$4.1.0] and  T0.[Amount] > $[$38.11.number]

 

 Screenshot showing the Volume Discounts format of the price breaks and the PO with the error.

Any advice is appriceated. Thanks.

EDIT;
I've just realised it is the UDF that is causing this, it is set as numeric type.
Manually typing 1000 is fine, while entering 1,000 shows same error.
Do I then need to set a new UDF as Alphanumeric or can the FMS be changed to remove the comma before?

entry.title: Re: SAP Inside Track Munich 2024 (#sitMUC) - Secure Your Spot Now!
entry.content:
Hi @Joel_John ,

did you click the registration directly after you've logged in? I've just tested on my own and it worked just fine.

Best Regards
Gregor

entry.title: Re: [BYD] How to block Ship-to Location related 2408 Upda...
entry.content: Dear Sir/Madam, I have discussed the new feature with the development team. It is for the planning area in the Planning tab of the product master. In previous releases, if a blocked planning area was selected as the ship-to site/location, an error would prevent the user from creating a stock transfer order. However, in the 2408 release, this error has been changed to an alert. As a result, users can now create stock transfer orders even with a blocked planning area, allowing for greater business flexibility. Best regards, Gavan SAP Technical Support, Public Cloud ERP

entry.title: Re: Build your app (new UI)?
entry.content:
Hey @EsmeeX 
Any progress on fixing this bug?
I can't build my app and it's been at least 3 days I think.

entry.title: Re: How to Block a Ship-to Location in SAP ByDesign
entry.content: Dear Sir/Madam, I have discussed the new feature with the development team. It is for the planning area in the Planning tab of the product master. In previous releases, if a blocked planning area was selected as the ship-to site/location, an error would prevent the user from creating a stock transfer order. However, in the 2408 release, this error has been changed to an alert. As a result, users can now create stock transfer orders even with a blocked planning area, allowing for greater business flexibility. Best regards, Gavan SAP Technical Support, Public Cloud ERP

entry.title: Re: Build your app (new UI)?
entry.content:
The Free Tier requires signing up for a global account with BTP, which looking something like this process: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=HQupwzu9-3s

Build Apps free edition only requires a simple form with email address/location when you are signing up.

entry.title: Re: SAC - Widget with separate filters
entry.content:
Hi @FrancescoPetrocelli ,

while the answer from @William_Yu  is usally the perfect answer there may be a reason, why it´s really important for you to stick to story filters.

If you really want to stick to them, you could add a new model (pointing to the same data source as the one you are currently using) and then bind your "Volume Spedito" KPI Chart to this new model instead of the currently used one.

Please keep in mind, that for this second model none of the other story filters have any effect, unless you´re working with linked dimensions. So let´s say the filter "Divisone" should have effect on your table and your KPI, you´ll need to link those dimensions.

Last but not least: This solution might be slower, since with two models SAC surely will create another request to load the data for the KPI Tile.

Best regards,
Denis

entry.title: test portal
entry.content: AP Community Downtime Scheduled for This Weekend

entry.title: Re: SAP CAP How to test DESTINATION to S4/Hana on premise...
entry.content:
Please refer to documentation on how to go about it.

Gist is in package.json you will find a snippet similar to the following if you have service named API_BUSINESS_PARTNER using destination S4HANA:

 

    "API_BUSINESS_PARTNER": {
      "kind": "odata",
      "model": "srv/external/API_BUSINESS_PARTNER"
        "credentials": {
          "destination": "S4HANA",
          "path": "/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_BUSINESS_PARTNER"
        }
    }

 

change it to 

 

    "API_BUSINESS_PARTNER": {
      "kind": "odata",
      "model": "srv/external/API_BUSINESS_PARTNER",
      "[production]": {
        "credentials": {
          "destination": "S4HANA",
          "path": "/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_BUSINESS_PARTNER"
        }
      },
      "[development]": {
        "credentials": {
          "url": "http://S4HANA.dest/",
          "path": "/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_BUSINESS_PARTNER"
        }
      },

    }

entry.title: Update with isolation_level vs. select with lock
entry.content:
What is the better approach to synch the update between multiple clients, when each row represents a task:

    update first taskstable set P=... where P='' Option(isolation_level = 2)

or 

    select first ID from taskstable with (UPDLOCK) where P='';
and when doing the update based on ID    update taskstable set P=... where ID = ... 

or any other suggestions?

entry.title: SAP BTP MTA for an Angular App
entry.content:
Hi,

we are currently working on a POC using Angular (UI5 Web Components) and Python on SAP BTP using a standalone app router.

We are currently struggling with creating a working MTA configuration. The plan is to have a angular frontend that sends request to a python microservice (which in turn calls other https enabled endpoints via destionations) and additionally we would like to directly call an S/4HANA OnPremise System using the SAP Cloud Connector with Principal propagation.

If we get this successfully up and running, we will create a series of blog posts on this.

Can anyone give us a sample MTA.yaml for an angular app and a python app using a standalone app router?

Thanks!

Best regards from Austria,

Martin

entry.title: Re: Smart table Header count showing wrong .
entry.content:
I'm posting this for future if any one face this issue. Check your manifest.js file "defaultCountMode" should be "Request". In my case it is different.

Thanks,

Siva Krishna Majji.

entry.title: Re: Create SAP S/4HANA External GL Account Hierarchy within SAP Datasphere using standard CDS Views
entry.content:

A question : Can we model Hierarchy with Directory View directly using standard Datasource 0GL_ACCOUNT_HIER as creating all these objects on different CDS Views is cumbersome and too many objects to maintain? Similarly 0GL_ACCOUNT_ATTR and 0GL_ACCOUNT_TEXT to fetch Attributes & Texts resp. Do you know if such scenario is possible?

entry.title: In Resource scheduling app - Operation cannot be scheduled automatically
entry.content:
Hi
One of Work center capacity utilization maintained 85%, while scheduling not able to achieve 100% scheduling of work center and giving "9XXXXXXXXX/0010: Operation cannot be scheduled automatically"

How to achieve 100% scheduling ? due operations how to schedule in same.


Another work center even maintained utilization as 85% 110% scheduling achieved, 
Scheduling date are same in both case and capacity Hrs and operating time are same. 

Please suggest  

Note: We are using S/4 HANA 2021 ,

entry.title: Regarding Bin location
entry.content:
I have query that i have one warehouse which is divided into 2 sublevels , whenever A/R invoice is made from that particular warehouse , it does not  shows that from which sublevel the material is getting deducted, 

My Concern is that whenever that particular A/R invoice is made and it goes for the approval , the auditor cannot see from which sublevel the stock is being deducted, until and unless ar invoice is made , please tell how to resolve it

entry.title: Re: PO to show next price break quantity on item from SPP...
entry.content:
SELECT replace(T0.[Amount],',','') FROM SPP2 T0 WHERE T0.[ItemCode] =$[$38.1.0] and  T0.[CardCode] =$[$4.1.0] and  T0.[Amount] > $[$38.11.number]

This sorted the issue

entry.title: ABAP Code Retreat Isernhagen
entry.content:
Connect with Fellow ABAP Developers and Dive into an Intense Coding Experience!

On September 10, 2024, we're excited to once again host an ABAP CodeRetreat at our Inwerken headquarters, starting at 10:00 AM.

This event is all about Test Driven Development and Clean Code. Participants will engage in 45-minute programming sessions, working on a coding kata that challenges and sharpens their development skills. The term "kata" refers to the problem that will be repeatedly solved throughout the day, forming the core programming task of the event.

After each session, we'll take a break with coffee and snacks, providing an opportunity to reflect on what has been accomplished. During these pauses, we'll also brief the next kata for the upcoming 45 minutes. This structure gives everyone a chance to expand their ABAP knowledge in a supportive environment. Of course, there's plenty of time to network during the breaks as well!

The event is free of charge, but spots are limited to 16 participants, so be sure to register early! All you need to bring is a laptop and your enthusiasm for coding.

The Inwerken AG team will take care of refreshments throughout the ABAP CodeRetreat, ensuring you can focus entirely on honing your skills and connecting with other developers.

Peter Jaeckel and Enno Wulff will be your hosts and guide you through the day.

Language will be german

Register here: https://www.inwerken.de/event/abap-coderetreat/

Hope to seeing you in Isernhagen!

entry.title: Issue with Double-Click Actions Not Recognized in SAP Fiori Recordings
entry.content:
Hello Community,

I am experiencing an issue with SAP Fiori recordings in the browser where double-click actions are not being recognized. For instance, when I perform a double-click to access the item overview, it is interpreted as a field-clearing action. Even if I manually change the action to a left double-click, the demo text does not automatically update. We would prefer not to modify the automatically generated texts to avoid issues with translations later on.

How can I resolve this issue?

entry.title: Web client does not display standard functions in Analysis data source
entry.content:
Hello there.

I have encountered an issue when configuring an Analysis view in the SAP Business One WEB client.

When accessing the definition of an analysis panel in the Web client, the list of data sources or sources is limited.

If I have many enabled queries or user tables, the list is displayed before the standard functions, so these functions do not appear to select and build system function views.

Can it be configured so that the user tables do not appear?

Can it be configured to show or not to show in this list?

It seems that it is a bug or error in the web client

In this case I only see the first 2...
Business Partners and Activities

In Spanish language

Al acceder en el cliente Web a la definición de un panel de análisis, la lista de origen o fuente de datos, está limitada.

Si tengo muchas consultas habilitadas o tablas de usuario, las lista antes que las funciones estándard, entonces no aparecen estas funciones para seleccionar y construir vistas de funciones del sistema.

¿Se puede configurar que no aparezcan las tablas de usuario?

¿Se puede configurar que ver o no ver en esta lista?

Tiene pinta que es un bug o error del cliente web

entry.title: Distribute values with a user-specific but repeatable key
entry.content:
Hi all,
I'm trying to distribute planned activity quantity according to the weight of a statistical key figure on a monthly basis. The origin monthly plan value of activity quantity must be overwritten. Statistical key figure is in the same version, company code and year as the activity quantity is but activity quantity is planned on cost center level and statistical key figure is planned for the whole company code.

 

I tried several combinations of allocation rules but they didnt work. Do you know an option to set a customized distribution key in SAC per company code? Did you solved such a problem before?

lvl1: Region
lvl2: - North
lvl3: - North East
lvl2: - South
lvl3: - South West

My requirement is to add all the levels of Hierarchy into single Dropdown. Below I have attached screenshot for dropdown expected output.

Thanks & Regards

Mohammed

entry.title: Exchange Rate integration from S/4 to IBP
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

In the S/4 system- in TCURR table- we have exchange rate maintained from USD -> CHF & EUR -> CHF.
But, there is no entry for USD -> EUR or EUR -> USD.
In IBP, this is required to convert price data from USD -> EUR & vice versa.
Is there a way to derive the USD -> EUR in CIDS from the current data setup in S/4 (USD-> CHF & EUR -> CHF).

Request your inputs.

Regards,

A.Basu

entry.title: How to transport migration cockpit project and objects from Dev to Qas in S4 Hana public cloud.
entry.content: How to transport migration cockpit project and objects from Development to Quality in S4 Hana Public Cloud for file and staging approach.

entry.title: French new 2025 legal chart of accounts
entry.content:
Starting january 2025 French Companies that report within French local GAAP need to use new general ledger accounts and some new accounting schemas. 

The legal requirement from the French Accounting Authority (ANC) can be found here.

What needs to be performed by SAP S/4HANA users in that regards ? 

From an accounting point of view

it means, mainly :

  • a new definition of the extraordinary result
  • the disappearance of the charge transfer
  • Changes to the chart of accounts
  • modernization of financial statements
  • a new presentation of the information contained in the Appendix.

Each company needs to analyze their own chart of accounts to determine if and where a change is required.

As tasks to consider :

  • Companies should check if they are using a declination of outdated accounts (provided below)
  • Companies should check if they need to use new 2025 local accounts 

 

From a SAP S/4HANA Cloud point of view

Customer usually adapt their own chart of accounts during implementation phase, based on SAP template. Once in production mode, it is customer accountability to update its own and unique chart of accounts.

 

As tasks to perform, using Self Service Configuration User Interface and Applications, we can consider  :

 

  • Adding, removing (blocked for posting), renaming, keeping some local French accounts

SCCUI 150002 – Manage Chart of Accounts

App Manage G/L Account Master Data

 

  • A change in mapping to operational chart of accounts, if French chart of accounts is managed as the local chart of accounts.

SCCUI 170016 – Manage Operating G/L Accounts

App Manage G/L Account Master Data

 

  • Updating the Financial Statement Version

SCCUI 102669 - Define Financial Statement Versions

Even if customizing doesn’t change (as operational YCOA is used for customizing and French chart of a accounts is used as alternative chart of accounts), it is still relevant to check customized accounts, to identify if mapped French local accounts need to be updated. This can be performed using (but not only) :

              SCCUI 100297 – Automatic Account Determination

Hope this help to get prepared !

 

 

2024 Accounts (removed in 2025)

1051 - Réserve spéciale de réévaluation

1052 - Ecart de réévaluation libre

1053 - Réserve de réévaluation

1055 - Ecarts de réévaluation (autres opérations légales)

1057 - Autres écarts de réévaluation en France

1058 - Autres écarts de réévaluation à l'Etranger

10611 - Réserve légale proprement dite

10612 - Plus-values nettes à long terme

10641- Plus-values nettes à long terme

10643 - Réserves consécutives à l'octroi de subventions d'investissement

entry.title: Custom CDS-View: I_MfgOrderOperationWithStatus as a external API not working
entry.content:
Hello,
I have a question on the key user extensibility / Custom CDS-Views of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

To consume Information of Manufacturing Order Operations, we would like to generate an external API via Custom CDS-View Structure on the Data source: I_MfgOrderOperationWithStatus. When we consume the API (in Excel for example) the following runtime Error appears: 

When we select just the top ten results of the query, its working. But when we want to get more results, like 100 or 1000 the runtime error appears. Does anyone know what the problem could be?

Here I have some additional Information:
When I select the SAP View I_MfgOrderOperationWithStatus as the Main Data Source in the custom CDS-View the following Log Detail is shown:

Does this mean that we cannot use this data source in an external API scenario? And if it is, can you already see it somewhere in the view-browser on the data source descriptions? 

Thanks a lot for your help!
Best Regards

entry.title: Getting Cannot get/ error after deploying SAP BTP project.
entry.content:
Hii everyone , 
i am writing this post becuase i am getting a unexpected error on my project after deployment on cloud foundry

 this is my ui after doing  cds watch profile but when i deploy this on cloud foundry i am getting  and error 

https://d6477c92trial-dev-hanaapp-srv.cfapps.us10-001.hana.ondemand.com/

Cannot GET /

 

but when i want inner data it provide me 
https://d6477c92trial-dev-hanaapp-srv.cfapps.us10-001.hana.ondemand.com/odata/v4/its-customer/customer

 

when i seach the issue i get this >-----{The root URL ("/") might not be defined in your service.}

so how i can solve this issue and what file i need to upload here so All You can help me to  resolve this issue.

entry.title: Re: Integration Center demo for the Compensation Module
entry.content: @xavierlegarrec Thanks for the information. Is it also possible to use IC job to Pull rating from PM Form to MDF object ? If Yes do you have any information on this.

entry.title: Re: SAP CAP How to test DESTINATION to S4/Hana on premise...
entry.content: will try that ...

entry.title: Re: Error when updating shipment from EWM to ERP
entry.content:
Hi Juergen,

How does the embedded EWM to identify the EWM link to more than one ERP system? Whether it is determined by the count of business system defined in the system? I see this is one snote explained error occurred once EWM linked to more than one ERP.

And for the IDOC to update the shipment’s status from EWM to S4HANA(my system version is S4 1909), if I modify it sender from S4HANA”s logical system to the EWM Dummy logical system, the IDOC will posted successfully.

entry.title: Re: Need help to get Build-Apps ressources
entry.content: Thank you for your answer and the links you provided ! The last one seems to feature some key elements that I may be able to use on my project.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano,

My name is Trang and I am 25 years old.

I identify myself as: People looking to switch their careers mid-life.

I have just finished the learning journey " Explore Integrated Business Processes in SAP S/4HANA". In the future, I want to boost my career with Group Reporting skills.

Here the completion picture of the learning journey:

I hope that you will consider my request.

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Need help to get Build-Apps ressources
entry.content: I was to quick on my previous answer. I wanted to add that for my project, I need to create a search bar that is connected to the S/4 data base, and then display the results in a table view. The second step whould be to allow the user to manually change a value in this table view which will then update the S/4 data.

entry.title: Enabling Web Assistant
entry.content:
Hi, I have done the training and watched the videos to create Guided Tours on the Web Assistant.  I know the steps to create one and can access the Carousel in the UAT system, we are not live yet.  But it doesn't show me a create or edit button.

I watched the session with SAP earlier this year (before I understood it).  I believe there is more set-up I need to do before the Web Assistant is fully activated?

Suggestions please.

Thanks

Ray

entry.title: Re: Task 3 - Enhancing CDS View Entities with Annotations
entry.content: Done.

entry.title: Re: SPRO Menu Path with TCode
entry.content: this does not work, sorry

entry.title: Re: Use of Sequence into SAP B1 / SAP Business One
entry.content:
Hi nikunjmehta2290,

It was provided for GST enhancements for India localization.

For the purposes of GST, new subdocument types have been introduced for invoices and credit memos to fulfill
the requirement of consecutive serial numbers for each document under GST laws.

For these new subdocument types, there is a different numbering series. The Document Numbering - Setup
screen can be used to view and amend these settings.

Sequence also reflects the GST Subdocument type.

Refer to these links:

https://help.sap.com/doc/e0d2da20184b4d969c6d3748f92077d5/10.0/en-US/How_to_Work_with_GST_in_the_India_Localization_of_SAP_Business_One.pdf#82 

 

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_BUSINESS_ONE/fe9004e23275471b868395b412ad5f80/125a188ec32a4a6d9583a8a7b9819b7a.html?locale=en%2FUS 

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Re: How to create a test double for method of another class?
entry.content:
I need to create unit tests for existing code without making any modifications to it. To illustrate my situation, I've prepared a small example. My objective is to simulate the functionality of the GET_CUSTOMER_ID method from the ZCL_CUSTOMER_UTIL class by mocking it.

 

CLASS zcl_customer_caculator DEFINITION
  PUBLIC
  FINAL
  CREATE PUBLIC .

  PUBLIC SECTION.

    METHODS get_customer_city_id
      IMPORTING
        !iv_custom_city       TYPE zsat4_city
      RETURNING
        VALUE(rt_customer_id) TYPE zcl_customer_util=>ty_customer_t .
  PROTECTED SECTION.
  PRIVATE SECTION.
ENDCLASS.



CLASS zcl_customer_caculator IMPLEMENTATION.


* <SIGNATURE>---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
* | Instance Public Method ZCL_CUSTOMER_CACULATOR->GET_CUSTOMER_CITY_ID
* +-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
* | [--->] IV_CUSTOM_CITY                 TYPE        ZSAT4_CITY
* | [<-()] RT_CUSTOMER_ID                 TYPE        ZCL_CUSTOMER_UTIL=>TY_CUSTOMER_T
* +--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------</SIGNATURE>
  METHOD get_customer_city_id.
    DATA(lt_customer_id) = zcl_customer_util=>get_cudtomer_id( iv_custom_city ).
    IF lt_customer_id IS INITIAL.
      MESSAGE 'No customers in this city' TYPE 'I'.
    ELSE.
      cl_salv_table=>factory(
        IMPORTING r_salv_table = DATA(lo_salv)
        CHANGING t_table = lt_customer_id  ).

      lo_salv->display( ).
    ENDIF.
  ENDMETHOD.
ENDCLASS.

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content: Hi everyone, I'm a back-end and integration developer from the Netherlands and I'm happy to join this community.

entry.title: Re: sap webide .xsjob
entry.content:
not sure if you have solved it already - we had a similar issue in our modules after changing to async-xsjs - and in the server.js file we needed to add the service for jobscheduler there. 

 

/MiB

entry.title: Re: Purchase order date
entry.content: Hello, Thank you very much for your reply, however I'm not sure if this solution applies to SAP Public Cloud?

entry.title: Successfully Completed the SAP Community Tour
entry.content:
I’m thrilled to share that I have successfully completed the SAP Community Tour! It was an amazing experience, and I gained valuable insights, connected with brilliant minds, and learned a lot about SAP’s innovative technologies.

A big thank you to everyone who contributed to making this event so enriching and engaging. Looking forward to applying these learnings and continuing my journey with the SAP community!

entry.title: Re: How to create a test double for method of another class?
entry.content:
The problem is that it is required to create unit tests for existing code without making any modifications to it. To illustrate my situation, I've prepared a small example. My objective is to simulate the functionality of the GET_CUSTOMER_ID method from the ZCL_CUSTOMER_UTIL class by mocking it.

CLASS zcl_customer_caculator DEFINITION
  PUBLIC
  FINAL
  CREATE PUBLIC .

  PUBLIC SECTION.

    METHODS get_customer_city_id
      IMPORTING
        !iv_custom_city       TYPE zsat4_city
      RETURNING
        VALUE(rt_customer_id) TYPE zcl_customer_util=>ty_customer_t .
  PROTECTED SECTION.
  PRIVATE SECTION.
ENDCLASS.



CLASS zcl_customer_caculator IMPLEMENTATION.


* <SIGNATURE>---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
* | Instance Public Method ZCL_CUSTOMER_CACULATOR->GET_CUSTOMER_CITY_ID
* +-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
* | [--->] IV_CUSTOM_CITY                 TYPE        ZSAT4_CITY
* | [<-()] RT_CUSTOMER_ID                 TYPE        ZCL_CUSTOMER_UTIL=>TY_CUSTOMER_T
* +--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------</SIGNATURE>
  METHOD get_customer_city_id.
    DATA(lt_customer_id) = zcl_customer_util=>get_cudtomer_id( iv_custom_city ).
    IF lt_customer_id IS INITIAL.
      MESSAGE 'No customers in this city' TYPE 'I'.
    ELSE.
      cl_salv_table=>factory(
        IMPORTING r_salv_table = DATA(lo_salv)
        CHANGING t_table = lt_customer_id  ).

      lo_salv->display( ).
    ENDIF.
  ENDMETHOD.
ENDCLASS.
